plugins.name: jira-sprint-workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end Jira sprint workflow for Claude Code teams. Ships three skills: jira-story-design (brainstorm → spec → plan → create 11 self-contained subtasks), jira-story-execute (autonomously walk the chain to Done, pausing only at the human manual-test checkpoint, with full resumability from Jira state), and jira-architect-review (right-sized production-readiness review — 3 / 5 / 7 / 10 angles scaled to the diff).
